sentence: 实验室里的试剂要妥善保存。
pinyin: Shíyànshì lǐ de shìjì yào tuǒshàn bǎocún.
english: Reagents in the lab must be stored properly.

sentence: 把杯子倒置放在架子上晾干。
pinyin: Bǎ bēizi dàozhì fàng zài jiàzi shàng liànggān.
english: Place the cups inverted on the rack to dry.

meaning: to study (in an academic program); to pursue (a degree)
sentence: 她正在修读计算机专业的硕士课程。
pinyin: Tā zhèng zài xiū dú jì suàn jī zhuān yè de shuò shì kè chéng.
english: She is currently pursuing a master's degree in computer science.

sentence: 他学了一年调酒，现在能做很多鸡尾酒。
pinyin: Tā xué le yī nián diào jiǔ, xiàn zài néng zuò hěn duō jī wěi jiǔ.
english: He studied bartending for a year and can now make many cocktails.

pinyin: Shí chú yǐ sān, yú shù shì yī.
english: Ten divided by three has a remainder of one.
